description_long: This office building features a modern, boxy structure with a flat, slightly gabled roof and a prominent blue and black color scheme. The facade includes large signage with the name 'FILCOR', and the main entrance is set back from the street, flanked by trees and a striped pedestrian walkway. The exterior walls combine blue panels, black accents, and sections of exposed brick, giving the building a contemporary urban appearance. The windows are arranged in a regular horizontal band, with some areas featuring large glass panels and others more solid, opaque surfaces. The surrounding area includes parked vehicles, trees, and a striped pavement, suggesting a busy urban context. The building appears to have a single main floor with a high ceiling, and the overall design emphasizes accessibility and visibility.
description: A modern office building with blue and black panels, large signage, and a flat roof, set in an urban environment with striped walkways and trees. The facade features regular windows and a prominent main entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large 'FILCOR' signage, blue and black facade, and striped pedestrian walkway with trees and parked vehicles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick wall sections, horizontal window bands, and the continuation of the striped pavement and landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly solid wall with large glass panels and minimal architectural detailing, emphasizing the building's depth.
description_view_3: Side view with a focus on the garage or service entrance, blue awning, and the striped pavement extending along the building's side.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular horizontal bands of rectangular windows, evenly spaced along the facade, with some large glass panels.
